_meta.author: ruixen.ui
_meta.title: ProductTable
_meta.description: Animated Product Table is a highly interactive, feature-rich table built with React, TanStack Table, and Framer Motion. It supports global search, pagination, and column toggling, while providing smooth animations for all table interactions. When columns are toggled, they expand or collapse with a fluid transition, and rows fade and slide in/out seamlessly. This ensures a polished, modern user experience where data updates and structural changes are visually appealing, making it ideal for dashboards, admin panels, or any application requiring dynamic table displays.
